pain_points: Never brush your retainer again (dental hygiene hassle)
Food spoilage and waste (throwing away money)
Skin problems that no products fix (beauty frustration)
Vaginal odor, discharge, and infections (intimate confidence loss)
Difficulty putting on shoes as you age (mobility pain)
